description_long: This is a full-sized acoustic guitar with a classic dreadnought body shape, featuring a light-colored spruce top and darker wooden sides and back. The soundhole is round and bordered by a simple rosette, while a black pickguard sits below the strings to protect the body from strumming wear. The neck is made of a darker wood and is fitted with metal frets and dot inlays along the fingerboard. The headstock is rectangular with six tuning pegs, three on each side, and no visible logo. The bridge is a standard acoustic style, holding the strings in place with white bridge pins. The overall finish is smooth and slightly glossy, highlighting the natural wood grain.
description: A classic dreadnought acoustic guitar with a light spruce top, dark wood sides, and a black pickguard. It features a smooth, glossy finish and a standard six-string setup.
description_view_0: Front view showing the soundhole, pickguard, and the full face of the guitar body.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the guitar's depth, curved body, and the length of the neck.
description_view_2: Top-down view focusing on the fingerboard, headstock, and the alignment of the strings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the body contour and the back of the neck.
attribute_headstock_design: Rectangular headstock with three tuning pegs on each side, no visible logo, and a simple, traditional contour.
